vision: Track every meaningful AI development tool on GitHub. 10K repos by end of March 2026. 100K by end of April 2026.

live.name: reporium
live.description: AI tool discovery frontend: full-text search, category filtering, static JSON serving, mobile responsive

live.name: reporium-api
live.description: FastAPI + PostgreSQL + pgvector: 702 repos queryable, Redis caching

live.name: reporium-ingestion
live.description: AI enrichment pipeline: Ollama local AI, four-tier cache, nightly batch, 12 categories

live.name: forksync
live.description: 68s for 805 repos: 50 concurrent calls, Cloud Run + Redis + VPC, smart scheduling, 91% faster than v1

in_progress.name: reporium-db
in_progress.description: GraphQL batch fetch, schedule tiers, checkpoint/resume, partitioned JSON: target 10K repos

in_progress.name: reporium-dataset
in_progress.description: Nightly auto-generated README, top repos table, freshness indicator, public dataset mirror

in_progress.name: portfolio
in_progress.description: Real metrics from live sources, auto-updates nightly, link to live products

in_progress.name: reporium-roadmap
in_progress.description: This file: live commit dates, feature tracking, version history

in_progress.name: reporium-metrics
in_progress.description: Nightly collection, ASCII trend charts, milestone tracking

coming_next.name: repo-intelligence
coming_next.description: 0-100 repo scorer: README, activity, community, CI. Pip-installable.

coming_next.name: reporium frontend v2
coming_next.description: Figma-designed UI: faster, cleaner, better filtering

backlog.name: reporium observability
backlog.description: Latency dashboards, error rate tracking, SLO definitions

backlog.name: public API v2
backlog.description: Rate-limited public REST API with API keys
